name: CELERITY-panel
desc: Self-hosted web panel for Hysteria 2 & Xray VLESS proxy servers. Features cascade network topology (Forward/Reverse Chain), SSH auto-setup, server groups, load…
descFull: Self-hosted web panel for Hysteria 2 & Xray VLESS proxy servers. Features cascade network topology (Forward/Reverse Chain), SSH auto-setup, server groups, load balancing, ACL traffic filtering, API with scopes, webhooks, S3 backups, MCP integration, and subscriptions for Clash/Sing-box/Hiddify.
